entries.title: Founder OS / Multi-Business Tool — Customer Review Intelligence
Founder Tool Frustrations — Reddit & Community Intelligence
entries.summary: Reddit and community intelligence on founder frustrations with productivity tools, CRM, multi-business bookkeeping, and AI advisors. Surfaces 7 pain themes with verbatim user quotes and JTBD language. Australian Xero pricing crisis confirmed as active churn window.

entries.title: Technical Founder Voice — Business Management Tool Frustrations (HN / IH / GitHub)
sources: Hacker News (Ask HN, Show HN, comment threads)
entries.summary: Verbatim quote corpus from HN, IndieHackers, GitHub issues, and community forums documenting 8 dominant frustrations technical founders express about business management tools. Includes JTBD language extraction, 26 sourced findings, and Nexus positioning recommendations.

entries.title: Australian Founder Customer Voice — Multi-Business Management Pain Points
sources: COSBOA / CommBank 2024 Small Business Perspectives Report
Small Business Australia Big Small Business Survey 2024
GoGravity / Mayday / IT Brief (Xero multi-entity analysis)
Smiling Mind / Startup Daily (AU founder mental health)
entries.summary: Deep investigation into Australian-specific founder pain points for multi-business management. 10 findings across Xero/MYOB multi-entity friction, AU regulatory complexity (BAS, ASIC, STP, super), US tool pricing backlash, founder mental health crisis, and data sovereignty concerns. Includes JTBD table and US tool failure matrix. 30 sources across T1-T3. Key gap: direct verbatim community quotes inaccessible due to platform restrictions — primary research interviews recommended.
